---
title: "Pathological Periodicity"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  contents: posts/en
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, description]
  include:
    categories: "Pathological Periodicity"
---

An exploration of the set of periods of periodic functions $f:\mathbb{R}\to\mathbb{R}$, the pathologies that arise when the axiom of choice is assumed, and related matters in real analysis and set theory.

Posts are listed in reading order.
